title: AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE SEAT OF GOVERNMENT OF TALUKSANGAY DISTRICT, CITY OF ZAMBOANGA, TO PASILMANTA, SAKOL ISLAND.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1979 / 55 OG No. 37, 7890 (September 14, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2512, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE SEAT OF GOVERNMENT OF TALUKSANGAY DISTRICT, CITY OF ZAMBOANGA, TO PASILMANTA, SAKOL ISLAND.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The seat of government of Taluksangay District, City of Zamboanga, is hereby transferred from Taluksangay proper to Pasilmanta, Sakol Island.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
